prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约383→574→585→521→511，2021–2023年呈后移趋势（从383后移至585），2024–2025年小幅前移（585→521→511），近2年累计前移约74名；2025年基准约511名；本省理科/物理类计划2021–2022年均为38人，2023年39人，2024年40人，2025年42人，呈逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划大幅增至99人，较2025年扩招约135.7%，为近年最大幅度扩招，竞争格局将显著变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年持续位列全国第3名（Top3），属顶尖高校层次，品牌号召力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面（涉及学术不端、师德师风、校园安全事件），但作为全国顶尖名校，负面舆情对报考热度影响有限；抖音热度为高热（总排名第14），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高；历史投档异常记录为低关注，未见明显断档信号；浙江大学A-及以上学科多达35个，涵盖计算机科学与技术（A+）、软件工程（A+）、控制科学与工程（A+）、光学工程（A+）、数学（A+）、临床医学（A）、法学（A）等，学科实力全国顶尖，对考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等浙大优势工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐；金融/财经/经济类分化观望；本省2026年考生总数约120万人，按2025年物理类占比约61.2%估算，物理类考生约73.4万人，较2025年55.5万人增长约32%，竞争加剧；浙江大学位于浙江省杭州市，属长三角发达地区，对河南省考生有较强跨省吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次511名、2026年计划大幅扩招约135.7%（位次后移压力）、本省物理类考生增长约32%（竞争加剧）、浙大顶尖名校地位及高热抖音关注度（报考热度不减）。扩招幅度远超考生增幅，位次后移趋势明确，预测最低位次约927名，区间821–1033名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 383 → 574 → 585 → 521 → 511. From 2021 to 2023, there was a backward trend (from 383 to 585), while from 2024 to 2025, there was a slight forward shift (585 → 521 → 511), with a cumulative forward shift of about 74 places in the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 511. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 38 in both 2021 and 2022, 39 in 2023, 40 in 2024, and 42 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 99, an expansion of about 135.7% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, which will significantly change the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, it consistently ranks 3rd nationally (Top 3), belonging to the top-tier university level with extremely strong brand appeal. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety incidents), but as a nationally renowned top university, negative public opinion has limited impact on application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity is high (14th overall), with significant exposure on short video platforms, leading to high application attention. Historical abnormal admission records show low concern, with no obvious signs of score gaps. Zhejiang University has 35 disciplines rated A- or above, including Computer Science and Technology (A+), Software Engineering (A+), Control Science and Engineering (A+), Optical Engineering (A+), Mathematics (A+), and Clinical Medicine (A), with top-tier academic strength nationwide, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other advantageous engineering majors at Zhejiang University continue to be highly recommended due to social popularity. Finance/economics/business majors are in a wait-and-see state. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 1.2 million. Based on the 2025 physics category proportion of about 61.2%, the estimated number of physics candidates is about 734,000, an increase of about 32% compared to 555,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, in the developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has strong cross-provincial appeal to Henan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 511, the 2026 plan expansion of about 135.7% (pressure for ranking to move backward), the 32% increase in provincial physics candidates (intensified competition), Zhejiang University's top-tier status, and high Douyin attention (sustained application enthusiasm). The expansion rate far exceeds the candidate growth rate, with a clear trend of ranking moving backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 927, with a range of 821 to 1033.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)

- Robotics Engineering (Honors Program Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Engineering Experimental Class (Materials, Chemical Engineering, and Polymers)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Including Vehicle Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, etc.)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Including Digital Finance Dual Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 821 to 1033, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 800), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 majors like the Chu Kochen Honors College Turing Class. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 1000), you should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category fluctuated significantly: approximately 190 → 283 → 254 → 302 → 210. The lowest ranking was in 2021 (190), with a general backward shift from 2022 to 2024 (283 → 254 → 302), and a sharp forward shift to 210 in 2025. In the past two years, it first decreased then increased, with a baseline of about 210 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 21 students in both 2021 and 2022, increased to 24 in 2023 and 2024, and dropped back to 21 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 37 students, an expansion of about 76.2% compared to 2025, indicating a notable expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. According to the Shanghai Ranking (Soft Science), it has consistently ranked 3rd nationally (Top 3) from 2021 to 2026, placing it among the top-tier universities. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but as a nationally renowned top university, the impact is limited. Its Douyin (TikTok) popularity is high (overall rank 14), indicating high application attention. Historical admission anomaly records show low concern, with no obvious signs of score gaps. Zhejiang University's strong liberal arts-related disciplines include Chinese Language and Literature (A), Foreign Languages and Literatures (A+), Law (A), Journalism and Communication (A-), Applied Economics (A-), Business Administration (A), and Education (A-), demonstrating strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a recommended social popularity (slightly hot), Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Finance/Economics/Business is divided and wait-and-see, and Teacher Training/Education is also divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is approximately 1.2 million. Based on the 2025 history category proportion of about 38.8%, the estimated number of history category examinees is about 466,000, an increase of about 32% compared to 352,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, a developed region in the Yangtze River Delta, which has a strong cross-provincial appeal for liberal arts examinees from Henan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 210, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of about 76.2% (pressure to shift ranking backward), the provincial history category examinee increase of about 32% (intensified competition), and Zhejiang University's top-tier status, the expansion rate is greater than the examinee growth rate, leading to a clear trend of ranking backward shift. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 306, with a range of 256–356.
